# Dungeons
# https://revengeofthefallengame.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Dungeons&prop=wikitext

In ROTF one of the main things to do is complete dungeons. Each dungeon is unique and allows the player to fight a variety of monsters and bosses to get strong equipment and items.
<div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 20px 20px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Dungeons</div><div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Easy dungeons</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| style="width: auto;" align="center"
|-  
| {{ImageBlack
| file = PirateCavePortal.png
| link = Pirate Cave
| text = Pirate Cave
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = ForestMazePortal.png
| link = Forest Maze
| text = Forest Maze
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = SpiderDenPortal.png
| link = Spider Den
| text = Spider Den
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = ForbiddenJunglePortal.png
| link = Forbidden Jungle
| text = Forbidden Jungle
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = TheHivePortal.png
| link = The Hive
| text = The Hive
}}
|}
</div>
<div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Medium dungeons</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| style="width: auto;" align="center"
|-  
|{{ImageBlack
| file = SnakePitPortal.png
| link = Snake Pit
| text = Snake Pit
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = SpriteWorldPortal.png
| link = Sprite World
| text = Sprite World
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge2
| file = CandylandHuntingGroundsPortal.png
| link = Candyland Hunting Grounds
| text = Candyland Hunting Grounds
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge2
| file = CaveOfAThousandTreasuresPortal.png
| link = Cave of a Thousand treasures
| text = Cave of a Thousand treasures
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = HauntedCemeteryPortal.png
| link = Haunted Cemetery
| text = Haunted Cemetery
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = UndeadLairPortal.png
| link = Undead Lair
| text = Undead Lair
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = AbyssOfDemonsPortal.png
| link = Abyss of demons
| text = Abyss of demons
}}
|-
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = ManorOfTheInmortalsPortal.png
| link = Manor of the Inmortals
| text = Manor of the Inmortals
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = ThePuppetsMasterTheatrePortal.png
| link = The Puppet's Master Theatre
| text = The Puppet's Master Theatre
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = ToxicSewersPortal.png
| link = Toxic Sewers
| text = Toxic Sewers
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = MadLabPortal.png
| link = Mad Lab
| text = Mad Lab
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = DavyJonesLockerPortal.png
| link = Davy Jone's Locker
| text = Davy Jone's Locker
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = DeadwaterDocksPortal.png
| link = Deadwater Docks
| text = Deadwater Docks
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = WoodlandLabyrinthPortal.png
| link = Woodland Labyrinth
| text = Woodland Labyrinth
}}
|-
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = TheCrawlingDepthsPortal.png
| link = The Crawling Depths
| text = The Crawling Depths
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = OceanTrenchPortal.png
| link = Ocean Trench
| text = Ocean Trench
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = TombOfTheAncientsPortal.png
| link = Tomb Of the Ancients
| text = Tomb Of the Ancients
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = AnubisLairPortal.png
| link = Anubi's Lair
| text = Anubi's Lair
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = CraigsCastlePortal.png
| link = Craig's Castle
| text = Craig's Castle
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = TheShowcasePortal.png
| link = The Showcase
| text = The Showcase
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = IllusionPortal.png
| link = Illusion
| text = Illusion
}}
|}
</div>
<div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Hard dungeons</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| style="width: auto;" align="center"
|-  
|{{ImageBlack
| file = TheShattersPortal.png
| link = The Shatters
| text = The Shatters
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = LostHallsPortal.png
| link = Lost Halls
| text = Lost Halls
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = OryxCastlePortal.png
| link = Oryx Castle
| text = Oryx Castle
}}
| {{ImageBlackLarge2
| file = PuppetMastersEncore.png
| link = Puppet Master's Encore
| text = Puppet Master's Encore
}}
|-
|{{ImageBlackLarge2
| file = TombOfDecayingDeath.png
| link = Tomb of Decaying Death
| text = Tomb of Decaying Death
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = AsgardPortal.png
| link = Asgard
| text = Asgard
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = NecropolisPortal.png
| link = Necropolis
| text = Necropolis
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = TheIcyPeaksPortal.png
| link = The Icy Peaks
| text = The Icy Peaks
}}
|-
|{{ImageBlack
| file = SthenosDenPortal.png
| link = Stheno's Den
| text = Stheno's Den
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = MalphasHideoutPortal.png
| link = Malphas's Hideout
| text = Malphas's Hideout
}}
|{{ImageBlackLarge1
| file = CavernOfSeptaviusPortal.png
| link = Cavern of Septavius
| text = Cavern of Septavius
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = LimonsLairPortal.png
| link = Limon's Lair
| text = Limon's Lair
}}
|}
</div>
<div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 0px 0px; padding: 15px;">Special dungeons</div><div style="background-color: #828286; border-bottom: 20px #828286 solid; padding: 10px;">
{| style="width: auto;" align="center"
|-  
|{{ImageBlack
| file = ArenaPortal.png
| link = Arena
| text = Arena
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = LuckyBoxPortal.png
| link = Lucky Box
| text = Lucky Box
}}
|{{ImageBlack
| file = AdminArenaPortal.png
| link = Admin Arena
| text = Admin Arena
}}
|}
</div>
<div align="center" style="font-size: 22pt; color: #ababab; width: auto; background-color: #070345; #242424; border-bottom: 20px #121212 solid; border-radius: 0px 0px 20px 20px; padding: 15px;">
